integrations.aiChatGreeting:
Hello! I'll help you configure the {name} integration. What would you like to set up?

• API Endpoints
• Authentication
• Webhooks
• Field Mapping

Or just paste a link to the documentation and I'll analyze it.

loyaltyLevels.title: Loyalty Levels
loyaltyLevels.subtitle: Information about levels and privileges
loyaltyLevels.rule1: Points are awarded automatically for each purchase as cashback (percentage depends on level).
loyaltyLevels.rule2: Level is determined by the total number of points earned over all time.
loyaltyLevels.rule3: Points can be used for a discount when paying for an order (minimum 100 points, maximum 50% of the order total).
loyaltyLevels.rule4: Unused points expire 180 days after accrual.
